'''Nolaan''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Captain/Legends|captain]] who served aboard the [[Interrogator/Legends|''Interrogator'']] under the command of [[High Inquisitor]] [[Antinnis Tremayne]].

==Biography==
Earlier in his life, Nolaan was assigned to the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] as a junior officer. This would later help bring [[Jovan Vharing]] to his attention who he took an instant liking to and was openly biased toward.<ref name="TLF" />

Nolaan became friend and mentor to Vharing and pulled some strings so that the then [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] was brought aboard the ''Interrogator''. Within a year of this, Nolaan was executed on the ship's bridge by Tremayne and succeeded by his protégé.<ref name="TLF" />
